DEFT SUPPLEMENTAL TO MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE PC1538,5 FILED
PD MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED

/CAL: STATUS OF M99, #21008911/X: M99 HIT AS AN ARRAIGNMENT TODAY ON LINE606,/X: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT WAS PREVIOUSLY DISCHARGED,/X: BAIL REMAINS AS PREVIOUSLY SET,/X: FUTURE COURT DATE IS CONFIRMED,/DOP/
/CAL: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT RETURN/X: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT ISDISCHARGED WITH NO CONTEMPT,/SHER/BAIL: 50,000/X: BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/CONTD: DEFENSE BAIL MOTION/DOP/

/CAL: SHERIFF AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/X: DEFENDANT WAIVES INTERPRETER/ACM/X:ASA CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDEALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X: FUTURE DATEIS CONFIRMED/

/CAL: TS PRELIMINARY HEARING/STWPX/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE, AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/WS/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/X: THE PEOPLE FILE NOTICEOF MOTION AND MOTION TO DETAIN/X: ORDER SEALING EXHIBIT IN SUPPORT OF NOTICE OF MOTION & MOTIONTO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL/NTW/LDPX:07-26-21/X:60TH: 08-10-21/987,2/NB/X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE, PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY, MOT TO SUPPRESS, BAIL HEARING/INTC/CTORD:MOTION TO SUPPRESS IS GRANTED/MO PC 1385:THE PEOPLE IS UNABLE TO PROCEED/
/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING AND DEFENSE BAIL MOTION/CTORD: ACM TERMINATED/CONT/DOP/
/CAL: PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING AND MOTION TO SUPPRESS/TE: 2 HOURS COMBINED/DOP/
